name: LedgerStream
problem: The billing platform reconciled balances in nightly batches, so disputes took up to 24 hours to surface and finance had no real-time view of exposure.
impact: Cut reconciliation latency from 24 hours to under 2 seconds and eliminated a class of double-charge incidents entirely.

name: Pulse CLI
tagline: Developer tool that surfaces service health from the terminal
problem: On-call engineers context-switched between five dashboards to triage an incident, losing minutes that mattered during outages.
impact: Reduced mean time to acknowledge by 35% by collapsing health, logs, and recent deploys into a single terminal view.
